verification_gate: Owner (David / Governance Board) records a bounded decision resolving RFC-Q1 with an explicit unblock condition, a deferral-or-rollback rule, and the current default preserved until unblocked.

gate_result.question: RFC-Q1
gate_result.decision: Mirofish stays adapter-only: DevWorld maps external simulator plugins through a bounded adapter surface and never embeds a full Mirofish runtime in v0.
gate_result.unblock_condition: A future RFC plus owner sign-off that specifies a bounded Mirofish runtime integration and its resource envelope.
gate_result.deferral_rollback_rule: Any Mirofish-dependent task reverts to the adapter-only surface; no runtime is introduced without the unblock RFC.

proof_summary: DECIDE-001 records the owner-ratified bounded decision for RFC-Q1 (DevWorld <-> Mirofish adapter scope): Mirofish stays adapter-only: DevWorld maps external simulator plugins through a bounded adapter surface and never embeds a full Mirofish runtime in v0. Unblock condition and deferral/rollback rule are recorded in 09_OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. The v0 default is preserved until an explicit unblock RFC with owner sign-off. No product execution performed.
